input.original_message: Hi, I'm Priya Sharma. The ceiling in my flat APT-2047 in Bandra West is leaking badly and furniture is getting damaged. Please send someone by 15th April. My number is 9876543210.

triage_report.draft_response:
Dear Priya Sharma, 

I apologize for the inconvenience caused by the ceiling leak in your flat APT-2047 in Bandra West, and I understand the urgency of the situation. I have escalated this matter to our maintenance team, and we will send someone to attend to the issue by 15th April as requested. You can expect a call from our team to confirm the appointment details. Please feel free to reach out to me directly at this number if you need any further assistance.

Best regards, 
[Your Name]
